ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that made the purchase */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model sold */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the vehicle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles sold */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., cash, credit card, etc.) */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel, etc.) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual, etc.) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase (e.g., cash, credit card, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative (e.g., 0.05 for 5%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales commission */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who earned the commission */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Amount of the commission */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the commission was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_commissions_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_commissions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle model in inventory */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the vehicle is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)
